name: @agentunion/fastaun-browser
description: AUN Protocol Core SDK for Browser

scripts.test:e2e: npm run build && playwright test --config=playwright.agentid-local.config.ts tests/e2e-browser/v2-p2p.spec.ts tests/e2e-browser/v2-group.spec.ts tests/e2e-browser/v2-thought.spec.ts tests/e2e-browser/collab.spec.ts --reporter=line
scripts.test:e2e:smoke: npm run build && playwright test --config=playwright.agentid-local.config.ts tests/e2e-browser/v2-p2p.spec.ts --grep "V2 session 自动初始化" --reporter=line
